entity.label: Adnah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A chief of the tribe of Manasseh who joined David at Ziklag (1 Chr. 12:20).

nodes.label: Adnah
nodes.description: A chief of the tribe of Manasseh who joined David at Ziklag (1 Chr. 12:20).

verses.text: As he went to Ziklag, there fell to him of Manasseh, Adnah, and Jozabad, and Jediael, and Michael, and Jozabad, and Elihu, and Zilthai, captains of the thousands that were of Manasseh.
